posts.text:
/wayfinder it is

More work on this today, I think this replaces /grill-with-docs in my stack (as an orchestrator over the top of it)

quote.text:
I'm working on a new skill which helps you plan enormous chunks of work, far larger than /grill-me can

It identifies the frontier of decisions and where the fog of war is  It suggests prototyping, research or grilling depending on what the decision is

As you push back the fog
